syllabus.subject: HAUSA
general_objectives: Acquire the ability to read and write competently in the Hausa language;
Know the basic features of Hausa language (syntax, phonology, morphology and semantics);
Have the basic knowledge of oral and written Hausa literature;
Have the ability to appreciate the culture, customs and institutions of the Hausa people;
Have the ability to translate competently from English to Hausa.

structure.contents_notes: (a) Ka'idojin Rubutu (Orthography); alphabetization, spelling, rules of word merger and division, punctuation and paragraphing all in line with standard Hausa. (b) Auna Fahimta (Comprehension); contextual questions from short unseen passages of about 200 words. (c) Tsarin Rubutun Insha'i (Composition Techniques); argumentative, descriptive, dialogue, expository, narrative and letter writing. (d) Fassara (Translation): i. Ire-iren fassara (types of translation), ii. Ka'idojin fassara (rules of translation), iii. Matsalolin fassara (problems of translation), iv. Dabarun fassara (techniques of translation). (e) Tsarin Sauti (Phonology): i. consonants production and classification in terms of phonation, place and manner of articulation; ii. vowels production and classification in terms of position of tongue and lips; monophthongs and dipthongs; iii. tone e.g., high, low and falling tones; iv. syllable structure - syllable types, e.g., open and close syllables, light and heavy syllables, syllabic categories of words monosyllabic, disyllabic, etc.; v. vowel length - long and short vowels; vi. phonological processes e.g., assimilatory: palatalization, labialization and vowel harmony; non-assimilatory: insertion and deletion. (f) Kirar Kalma (Morphology): i. roots and stems; ii. affixation e.g., prefix, infix suffix and their derivational and inflectional functions; iii. gender and number inflections; iv. derivation of nouns and adjectives from verbs; adjectives and verbs from nouns. (g) Ginin Jumla (Syntax): i. word classes - e.g., nouns, pronouns, verbs, adverbs, adjectives, prepositions, conjunctions, interjections and ideophones; ii. grammatical categories e.g., tense and aspect (general and relative past: general and relative continuous, first and second future, habitual); mood (subjunctive and negative); gender (masculine, feminine and neuter) and number (singular and plural); iii. sentence structure e.g., verbal sentence, nominal phrase + verbal phrase and their components, non-verbal sentence: nominal phrase + stabilizer, nominal phrase + compliment + stabilizer, nominal phrases continuous frame (yana../yake...) (+da) + nominal phrase; iv. sentence types e.g., simple sentences, compound sentences and complex sentences; v. clauses types (e.g., relative and subjunctive); functions (e.g., main and subordinate). (h) Ma'ana (Semantics): i. lexical aspects of word meaning - e.g., ambiguity, synonym and antonym; ii. figures of speech aspects of specialized meanings of words and phrases, e.g., idioms, proverbs etc.
objectives: Recognize the basic Hausa orthographical rules;
Apply the Hausa orthographical rules;
Identify linguistic errors, such as; grammar, wrong choice of words, wrong spelling etc.;
Read written Hausa texts;
Comprehend Hausa text in a given context;
Interpret various meanings and functions of words in a given text;
Acquire sufficient vocabulary;
Recognize central issues in a given text;
Draw conclusions based on available evidence in a given text;
Acquire the knowledge and techniques of composition writing in Hausa;
Recognize the different segments of composition in Hausa;
Recognize the different types of Hausa composition;
Translate proverbial and idiomatic expressions and new words from English to Hausa;
Recognize the different types of translation;
Understand the basic techniques of translating proverbial and idiomatic expressions and new words into Hausa;
Identify the problems of translation into Hausa;
Analyse the process of sound production and combination of sounds to form meaningful words in Hausa;
Appraise the importance of vowels in determining meaning;
Distinguish between the phonetic attributes of sounds;
Recognize the number of syllables and their types in a word;
Analyse the phonological processes in Hausa;
Explain the roots and stems of Hausa words;
Explain the inflectional process in Hausa word formation;
Explain the derivational process of word formation in Hausa;
Differentiate between the two morphological processes;
Analyse the processes governing word combination to form phrases; clauses and sentences in Hausa;
Detect linguistic errors in the grammar;
Recognize ideas or thoughts in written form;
Construct grammatical sentences for effective communication;
Use the appropriate tenses in spoken and written Hausa;
Use the appropriate gender and number in spoken and written Hausa;
Differentiate between types of sentence structure;
Distinguish between nominal and verbal phrase;
Distinguish between types of sentences;
Compare types of clauses;
Analyse the mechanisms of generating meanings in Hausa;
Build up their vocabulary;
Recognize the various meanings and functions of sentences in communication;
Use words and sentences suitable for a particular purpose;

structure.contents_notes: (a) Rayuwar Hausawa (Hausa customs): i. haihuwa (birth) - d'aukar ciki da goyon ciki da haihuwa da shayarwa da al'adun makon farko na haihuwa da wanka da 6anti da yaye da kaciya da samartaka; ii. aure (marriage) - ire-irensa da nema da baiko da d'aurin aure da biki da zaman aure da saki da zawarci; iii. mutuwa (death) fadar mutuwa da wanka da salla da jana iza da zaman makoki da sadaka da takaba da gado; iv. tasirin zamani akan rayuwar Hausawa. (b) Zamantakewa (Social Institutions): i. tsarin zaman iyali da zaman gandu da dangantakar kishiyoyi da yan uwantaka da barantaka da agolanci; ii. makwabtaka; iii. aikin gandu da na gayya; iv. abota da kawance; v. gaisuwa da karamci; vi. tasirin zamani a kan zamantakewa. (c) Sana'o'in Gargajiya (Traditional Occupations): i. ire-irensu noma da kira da jima da kasuwanci da wanzanci da sassaka da farauta da dukanci da saka da kitso da rini da fawa da fafar korai, da sauransu; ii. yanayinsu hanyoyin gadon su da kayayyakin yin su da matakan tafiyar da su da muhimmancisu; iii. kayayyaki ko amfanin da suke samarwa; iv. sarautunsu; v. sana'o'i masu dangantaka da jinsi aikatau da kwadago; kitso da aski.; vi. tasirin zamani a kan sana'o'in gargajiya. (d) Kayayyakin Bukatun Rayuwa (Material Culture): i. na bukatun cikin gida (household) tufafi da karikitan cikin gida; ii. na sauran bukatu (others) gine-gine da girke-girke da sauransu; iii. tasirin zamani a kan kayayyakin bukatuwa. (e) Bukukuwa da Wasanni (Hausa festivities and recreational activities): i. na addini (religious) irin su bikin salla da takutaha (sallar gani) da cika-ciki da saukar karatu; ii. na gargajiya (traditional) irin su kalankuwa da budar dawa, da bikin shan kabewa; iii. na sana'a (occupational) bikin kamun kifi da dambe da kokawa da wasan farauta da wasan makera da hawan kaho; iv. na nishadi - sukuwa; v. na yara (children's games) - irin su shalle da kulli-kurciya da a-sha-ruwan-tsuntsaye da gada da carafke; vi. tasirin zamani kan bukukuwa da wasanni. (f) Camfe-camfe da Bauta (Traditional Beliefs and Worship): i. camfe-camfe irin su kangida da camfi, da kambun baka da maita; ii. bauta irin su bori da da tsafi; iii. tasirin zamani a kan camfe-camfe da bauta. (g) Sarautun Gargajiya (Traditional Authority): i. ire-iren su sarakuna da hakimai da dagatai da masu unguwanni; ii. na bayin sarki shantali da jakadiya da baraya da sauransu; iii. masu alaka da addini; irin su liman da alkali; iv. ayyukansu; v. tasirin zamani a kan sarautun gargajiya. (h) Magungunan Gargajiya (Traditional Medicine): i. ire-iren su; na gargajiya: sassake-sassake da sawyoyi da na gari da na ruwa; ii. na addini: layu da rubutu da dibbu da duba; iii.  hanyar amfani da su sha da shafawa da surace da turare da shakawa da taunawa da tsotsawa da daurawa da likawa da ratayawa; iv. tsarin amfani da su awo da kimantawa; v. ayyukansu - riga-kafi da warkarwa; vi. tasirin zamani a kansu.
objectives: Bayyana al'adun da ke tattare da daukar ciki har zuwa samartaka;
Bayyana tasirin zamani a kan haihuwa;
Bayyana al'adun neman aure har zuwa zawarci;
Bayyana tasirin zamani akan aure;
Bayyana hanyoyin fadar mutuwa zuwa rabon gado;
Bayyana tasirin zamani akan mutuwa;
Tantance ma'ana da ire-iren tasirin zamani;
Bayyana tsarin dangantaka da mu'amala tsakanin iyali;
Bayyana muhimmancin zamantakewa a tsakanin Hausawa;
Tantance ire-iren tasirin zamani a kan al'adun zamantakewa;
Tantance d'abi'un masu sana'a;
Tantance kayayyakin da ake sana'antawa;
Tantance sana'o'in maza da na mata;
Zayyana kayayyakin sana'o'in;
Tantance hanyoyin gadon sana'o'in;
Zayyana amfanin kayayyakin sana'o'in;
Bayyana sarautun sana'o'in;
Bayyana muhimmancin sana'o'in;
Tantance tasirin zamani akan sana'o'in;
Tantance kayayyakin bukatun rayuwa na hausawa;
Tantance amfanin kayayyakin bukatun rayuwa na Hausawa;
Tantance tasirin zamani a kan kayayyakin bukatun rayuwa na Hausawa;
Zayyana ire-iren wasanni da bukukuwan Hausawa;
Nuna mahimancinsu;
Nuna yadda za a adana su kada su face;
Nuna yadda ake gudanar da su;
Nuna tasirin zamani a kan bukukuwa da wasanni;
Tantance ire-ire da hanyoyin aiwatar da su;
Bayyana amfaninsu;
Bayyana rashin amfaninsu;
Bayyana tasirin zamani a kansu;
Zayyana su ta fuskar ire-iren mukamai;
Zayyana matakan mukamai;
Tantance aikin kowane mai mukami;
Tantance mahimmancin kowane mukami;
Bayyana tasirin zamani a kansu (sarautun gargajiya);
Karkasa ire-iren magunguna;
Zayyana hanyoyin amfani da su;
Fito da amfaninsu;
Nuna tasirin zamani a kan su (magungunan gargajiya).

structure.contents_notes: I. Adabin Baka (Oral Literature): (a) Zuben Baka (Narratives): Irin su tatsuniya da almara da hikaya da kissa da tarihi da sauransu. (b) Maganganun Azanci (Folk - sayings); Irin su take da kirari da habaici da zambo da karin magana da kacici-kacici da salon magana da adon magana da sauransu. (c) Wakoki na baka (Oral songs): i. ire-iren su na fada da na jama'a da na maza da na sha'awa da sauransu; ii. turke (jigo) da salo da zubi da tsari da mawaki da kayan kida da abin da aka wake; iii. wakokin aiki: na nika da daße da na daka da na talla da sauransu; iv. Wakokin yara (maza da mata); na aure da na dandali da sauransu. (d) Wasannin Kwaikwayo Na Gargajiya (Traditional Drama): i. Na yara: ire-irensu langa da wasan 'yartsana da tashe da wasan gauta da dokin kara da sauransu; yadda ake yin su; muhimmancinsu. ii. Na manya: ire-irensu yan kama da kalankuwa da hoto da wowwo da tashe, da sauransu; yadda ake yinsu; muhimmancinsu. II. Rubutaccen Adabi (Written Literature): Zube (Prose): i. Maraya. Waka (Poetry): i. Wakokin Wayar Da kai Don Manazarta Hausa Na Daya. Wasan Kwaikwayo (Drama): i. Malam Zalimu.
objectives: Tantance nau 'o'in zuben baka;
Amfani da kalmomin da suka dace da kan labari;
Tantance sigogi da bayyana hanyoyin amfani da su;
Nakalta da amfani da kalmomin da suka dace da maganganun azanci;
Tantance ire-iren wakokin baka;
Tantance masu yin ire-iren wakokin;
Rarrabe siga da turke (jigo) da salo da zubi da kayayyakin aiwatar da su;
Tantance nau'o'in wakokin aiki;
Tantance masu yin wakokin aiki;
Bambance sigogin wakokin yara;
Tantance sigogin wasannin kwaikwayo na gargajiya;
Tantance hanyoyin gudanar da wasannin kwaikwayo na gargajiya;
Fito da muhimmancin wasannin kwaikwayo na gargajiya;
Fayyece bambancin wasan kwaikwayo na yara da na manya;
Tantance siga da tsari da jigo da salo da taurarin cikin littafin zube tare da nazarin su;
Nakaltar ka'idojin rubutu yayin karanta rubutun zube;
Nakaltar ma'anonin kalmomi da na jumloli domin fahimtar labari;
Tantance muhimman sakonni a cikin labari da yanke hukunci game da labarin;
Fahimtar jigo da salo da siga da zubi wajen nazarin zaba66iyar waka;
Yin la'akari da ka'idojin rubutu musamman na waka;
Tantance ma'anonin kalmomi da na jumloli wajen nazarin waka;
Danganta amfani da kalmomi da jumloli da sakon waka;
Tantance muhimman sakonni a cikin waka da yanke hukunci game da ita;
Tantance yanayin wurin wasa da jigo da salo da 'yan wasa da siga da tsarin rubutaccen wasan kwaikwayo da aka zaba don nazari;
La'akari da muhimmancin ka'idojin rubutu wajen fitar da ma'ana;
Nakaltar ma'anar kalmomi domin fahimtar wasa;
Tantance muhimman sakonni a cikin wasa da yanke hukunci game da sakonnin.
